channel.title: Hotel Occupancy on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Hotel Occupancy on Bali Kini

item.title: Bali Tourism June 2026: 553K Visitors in April, Target 6.6M for the Year
item.description: Bali welcomed 553,000 foreign visitors in April 2026, according to the latest data from BPS Bali (Statistics Indonesia). While this represents a 6.41% decline year-on-year, the island’s tourism economy tells a more nuanced story. The Visitor Paradox Despite fewer international arrivals, hotel occupancy rates across Bali actually increased during the same period. Analysts attribute this anomaly to a surge in domestic tourism — Indonesian travelers from Java and other islands filling the rooms that fewer foreign visitors left empty.
